subcodes.first_line: The Sovereign of existence hath borne witness, in these days, to that which the Youth hath testified: that verily, there is no God but Him, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد مالک الانام بما شهد الغلام فی هذه الایام انه لا اله الا هو العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
